summary: Comprehensive testing of LLM Wiki Dashboard completed. Backend APIs mostly functional (18/19 passed), frontend UI fully working with excellent navigation and CRUD operations. One critical LLM integration issue identified.

critical_bugs.issue: LLM integration failing with import error: cannot import name 'chat' from 'emergentintegrations.llm.chat'
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks all chat functionality - core feature of the application

integration_issues.issue: Chat UI works perfectly but backend LLM integration fails

passed_tests: Authentication flow - login/logout working with httpOnly cookies
Dashboard stats display - all stat cards showing correctly
Wiki CRUD operations - create, read, update, delete all working
Source ingestion - text ingestion working properly
Activity log - displaying entries with working filters
Settings page - provider info and health status displaying
Navigation sidebar - all links working correctly
Login page rendering with proper form fields
Wiki search and page management UI
Source ingestion UI with file/URL/text tabs
Responsive design and data-testid attributes present
JWT authentication with proper cookie handling
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix LLM integration import error in emergentintegrations.llm.chat module. The chat functionality is completely broken due to import failure. All other features working perfectly.
